title: Lepidaploa pallescens
taxonomy: Lepidaploa pallescens is classified as a species within the family Asteraceae. This plant is a member of the tribe Caleinae and genus Lepidaploa. Lepidaploa pallescens is native to South America and belongs to the order Asterales. The classification of Lepidaploa pallescens is further supported by its unique characteristics and morphological features. It is a species of flowering plant that is closely related to other species within the Asteraceae family.
